goal: build context usefulness eval for .agents using outcome-level A/B, harmful-context sentinels, and MemRL feedback integration

items.reason: Prior selected direction: Decision/Context Compiler First.
Validated the product direction and warned that typed packet contracts are needed.
Validated `.agents/` as the existing corpus and identified missing compiler contract.
Corpus-state gates can correctly fail when citation activity is absent or insufficient.
Existing A/B primitive can be extended from skill suppression to context suppression.
Existing garbage-learning detection should feed the new harmful-context eval.
